articles.description: Follow build-up to last-16 second leg action in the Europa League and Conference League, with Nottingham Forest, Crystal Palace and Aston Villa all in action.
articles.title: Europa & Conference League LIVE: Build-up, team news, score & live text updates

articles.description: Caf executive committee member Augustin Senghor says the decision to strip Senegal of the 2025 Afcon title is "unacceptable, abject and we have to denounce it".
articles.title: Afcon 2025: Senegal's title being handed to Morocco 'has to be denounced', says Caf executive

articles.description: Senior football correspondent Sami Mokbel breaks down Manchester United's search for a new midfielder to replace the outgoing Casemiro.
articles.title: Manchester United: Casemiro replacement contenders include Anderson, Wharton and Tonali

articles.description: British sprinter Amy Hunt on inspiring female athletes to get university degrees as she prepares to compete at the World Athletics Indoor Championships.
articles.title: World Athletics Indoor Championships 2026: Amy Hunt on empowering female athletes

articles.description: Europe's top leagues are summoned to a meeting with Uefa to discuss how VAR technology is being used.
articles.title: VAR: Uefa calls leagues to summit over 'microscopic' video assistant referees

articles.description: Four Ireland players are chosen in the Six Nations Team of the Tournament, which also includes players from France, Italy, Scotland and Wales, but no England players make the XV.
articles.title: Six Nations 2026: Four Ireland players named in team of tournament but no England players selected

articles.description: Interim Tottenham manager Igor Tudor is charged with misconduct over his claim that referee Thomas Bramall favoured the "home team" in their loss at Fulham.
articles.title: Spurs' Igor Tudor charged with misconduct over 'home referee' claim

articles.description: Lerone Murphy says the winner of his bout with Movsar Evloev at UFC London on Saturday should be next in line to fight for the featherweight title and it "shouldn't be any other way".
articles.title: UFC London: Lerone Murphy shuts down Jean Silva title talk

articles.description: At 15, Manchester United's JJ Gabriel is too young to play in the Premier League but he is already showing clear signs he is a huge talent.
articles.title: Manchester United: JJ Gabriel - the latest Old Trafford prodigy, aged 15

articles.description: A number of European clubs call for a change to the Champions League rules to allow teams from the same country to draw each other in the league phase.
articles.title: Champions League rules: English dominance of league phase prompts rethink
